title: richly roasted mexican yuzu burrito
description: a pungent and gooey crowd-pleaser featuring yuzu and crispy tortillas
instructions: heat the oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
add the diced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
add the yuzu juice and stir to combine.
reduce heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20 seconds.
assemble the burritos by filling each tortilla with the yuzu mixture, beans, and cheese.
place the burritos on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
roast in the oven at 425f for 15 minutes or until crispy and golden brown.
remove from the oven and let cool for 5 minutes before serving.
serve with your favorite toppings such as salsa, guacamole, and sour cream
